occupation: Global Chief Product Officer at Talon
headline: Global Chief Product Officer at Talon
summary:
A specialist in large scale initiatives, working with Fortune 500 companies to devise multi-channel marketing strategies, utilizing consumer insights, behavioral analytics and metric-driven results.  Extensive experience with international markets, business analysis, project and personnel management.

Specialties: Digital marketing, behavioral analytics, audience segmentation and thought leadership

experiences.title: Chief Data Officer, Europe
experiences.description: Defining and leading the rollout of a unified data and sales channel strategy across 16 countries in Europe

experiences.title: Commercial Innovation Director, Europe
experiences.description:
Led the global rollout of Clear Channel RADAR, including product development, GTM strategy, and data evaluation

Oversaw simultaneous launch of RADAR in Spain and UK with additional markets in Europe planned over the next 2 years

Launched Clear Channel's programmatic platform: LaunchPAD now live in UK, Spain, Italy, Belgium, Switzerland, Finland and Netherlands

Helped define a framework for ethical data usage in accordance with GDPR regulations

experiences.title: SVP Research & Insights
experiences.description:
Developing a research agenda using digital data to prove and enhance the value of out-of-home (OOH) advertising

Lead architect of Clear Channel Outdoor RADAR - a Graphical User Interface (GUI) that utilizes aggregated mobile location data to identify consumers exposed to OOH advertising

Using RADAR to create a new model for OOH audience segmentation, campaign attribution, and cross channel targeting

experiences.title: VP Strategy & Research
experiences.description:
Generated product narrative and positioning around the use of sharing data to drive campaign performance, leading to revenues > $50MM in 3 years.

Recruited and led team of 4 strategists to proactively focus on major clients and generated 10% revenue growth (double company average) on strategic accounts

Partnered with major brands / research organizations including Unilever, Toyota, Nielsen and The Paley Center for Media to create research and insights to demonstrate the value of sharing and measure its impact on real-world consumer purchase behavior.  Generated over $15MM in associated revenue from inbound leads

Evangelized "the sharing economy” and established ShareThis’ role role as experts on sharing data through speaking engagements at conferences including Internet Week, JD Powers, IAB MIXX, SocialMedia.org, The Innovation Exchange and Cynopsis Media.  Have also lectured at NYU as part of their MBA program.

experiences.title: Strategy Director
experiences.description:
Led a team of 6 strategists to drive account growth in the East Coast region through customized advertising solutions and drove over $150MM in ad sales

Worked with engineering team to create the Segmentation Insights Platform (SIP) to profile customers using AOL user data and showcase audience-based buying

Created new account segmentation to help prioritize proactive account work and streamline approval process for new projects

experiences.company: Advertising.com, A Division of AOL Platforms
experiences.title: UK Delivery Manager

accomplishment_publications.name: Fashion Retailer Uses New OOH Campaign to Lift Black Friday Sales
accomplishment_publications.description: Article about how fashion retailers are using CCO RADAR to optimize their location marketing strategy and boost in-store sales

accomplishment_publications.name: Out-of Home-Advertising Enters a New Era for Restaurants
accomplishment_publications.description: Enhanced targeting and measurement capabilities are changing the way quick-service restaurants engage customers.

accomplishment_publications.name: How Out-of-Home Ad Measurement Benefits Dealers and OEMs
Location profiling is the next frontier in audience insights
accomplishment_publications.description: In the past, out-of-home advertisers relied upon traffic data and census data to calculate ad exposure. By using mobile technology, we can access rich and nuanced profiles of people who walk, drive, or ride past out-of-home properties. There are two ways this helps advertisers sell: It provides data on where the highest concentrations of people are located. It also lets us profile a location, which can show where else the viewers go and better understand the type of advertising messages that might appeal to them.

accomplishment_publications.name: Online Movie Chat Translates to Ticket Buying in Big Way
accomplishment_publications.description: A study to investigate the relationship between online sharing of entertainment content and movie ticket purchases

accomplishment_publications.name: How Wendy's Views Social Data
accomplishment_publications.description: Joint release with Wendy's and Mediavest NY to show how we used sharing data to target influential users and spread product messages more effectively

accomplishment_publications.name: The role of sharing the purchase cycle for Hertz rentals
accomplishment_publications.description: ShareThis and Hertz partnered to map the Hertz customer journey to reservation and determine the role of social on customers’ decision process

accomplishment_publications.name: Sharing is more than just Fans, Friends and Followers
accomplishment_publications.description: Joint research study with Starcom Mediavest Group to show what, why and how people share content and how marketers can make better use of this growing trend

accomplishment_patents.title: Graphical User Interface (GUI) Generation Based On Billboard Profiles
accomplishment_patents.description: Systems and methods of generating a graphical user interface (GUI) to facilitate audience analysis for a set of billboards are disclosed.  For example, billboard profiles (BPs) may be used to generate GUIs that identify billboards (BBs) having an audience that exhibits particular behaviors.  A billboard profile (BP) of a billboard (BB) may indicate a count of devices (e.g., mobile devices) that, during a time period, passed the BB and were associated with a particular behavior.  A behavior may be ascribed to a device based on a detected location of the device during the time period.  To illustrate, a device may be determined to be associated with the particular behavior in response to determining that the device was detected at a location-of-interest (e.g., a health food store) that is associated with the particular behavior (e.g., shopping at a health food store).  By counting devices that pass the BB and exhibit particular behaviors, a more precise analysis of the audience of the BB may be determined.

accomplishment_patents.title: Method For Audience Profiling And Audience Analytics

recommendations:
Ramanathan Ramaswamy

I worked with Andy when we built the campaign analytics to derive more insights about the data and to generate reports to measure campaign performance. Andy played a key role by helping engineering with clear requirements from sales perspective. Andy always provided us with specific examples of data and visualization for pre-campaign and post-campaign analytics. I admire his customer centric approach and learned how sales and engineering/product teams can work together to achieve a common goal.

Saikat Mukherjee

I worked with Andy and his team on formulating research insights from social behavioral data. These insights were significant for ShareThis in creating new as well as expanding existing online advertising opportunities/campaigns with brands and agencies and in general to position the company as a thought leader in social data. Andy is a data scientist’s dream colleague — he understands the trees without losing sight of the forest. He has a great sense of the advertising industry in general and particularly when it comes to how data is viewed/used at agencies and brands. He brought all that experience in formulating innovative metrics from our social data and combined that with a terrific story-telling ability to create very impactful research reports — simple, concise, quantitative and with a narrative. A true data-driven marketeer and a great person to work with!

Saikat Mukherjee
